target: 10th Round
18. July 24
July 24
Now, this mikoshi will descend along the shrine path and be carried to Omoto Beach!

We'll load all the trash collected in the clean-up contest onto the mikoshi…
But remember, even garbage is part of the deity!

Then we'll ascend the shrine path again,
and return to the inner courtyard!

We'll parade along with this mikoshi, and then…
What a surprise!!

Thanks to Hiruko's blessings, your health luck will skyrocket!!!
Please all come join in!!

You can see the fireworks clearly from inside the courtyard,
highly recommended!!!
Let's all live long together with me!!
(Living a long life…?)
(You know, I hadn't even thought about tomorrow…)
Looking sharp in that outfit, Karikiri-san!
Shinpei-kun…
Do your best today, okay?
Haha, thanks!
…Shinpei-kun? What's wrong?
The search for Ushio is canceled!
…So the loop has restarted?

Shinpei's "certainty"…
I thought it was about Ushio.
He planned to add another two Usui and enter the Hiruko Cave!

But it's not that.
His "certainty" is…
The one who hid the handprint was…!!
Haine… what exactly did you see??
In the Hiruko Cave…
That guy… used the loop to point Ushio at my throat!!!

The search of Kii Strait…
No strays will ignore my signal.
…What does that mean?

Shinpei's position has disappeared, and it's been an hour.
How do you see this, Shide?
…You erased that handprint?

The handprint can't be erased…
It's a mark on Shinpei's very existence.

But you can block their presence.
Like how you do in the mud…
You've given too many hints…

Most of the strays are out searching for Ushio.
If they enter Hiruko Cave now…
No, that's not happening yet.

They came to my sleeping place once and tried to corner me…
Without extreme certainty, they won't re-enter--
--that's what Shinpei would think.
Then, why are they hiding?
This is just speculation--

If… the "Ushio" attached to Shinpei could sense 
their own position drifting in Kii Strait, what would happen?

To contact Ushio before us,
he's hiding his own position to prevent us from learning where she is… Shinpei would do that.

Find Ushio…
Take care of her before they do!
It's quiet…

Yes…
It's been silent for a long time.
That means Shinpei's plan is working, right?
…Hm.
Covering his left eye brings out Ryunosuke's personality, huh?

…It's been a while since we could talk like this.
Ryunosuke.
My sister… was grateful to you, Nezu-san.
Huh?
For saving her 14 years ago.

Ah…
Sometimes Hizuru would send me letters…

Saying her pickled eggplant was good,
or that she started keeping a cat…
Nonsense stuff like that.

When I heard her book became a movie,
I was shocked… heheh.
Why didn't she tell me first that she'd become an author?!

Only you knew about it in real life,
Nezu-san.
…What is that guy? A shy one?

You were the only adult who believed 
my sister's story about shadows.

Hmph… that made me a weirdo too!
Well, I'm used to it now though.
…I trust you, Nezu-san.
My sister too.
…It's a bit late for words now…
They're here!!!
